name: envi_nm_thin_barrier
comment: ENVI VAL-03 scene (b): free-field geometry of scene (a) PLUS a thin vertical barrier (screen) at x = 50 m, perpendicular to the source-receiver line, 4 m tall, flat HARD ground (G=0). Isolates barrier insertion loss (Abar / CNOSSOS Adif). REPORT-ONLY: Nord2000 Hadden-Pierce wedge vs CNOSSOS empirical Adif differ by design (0-6 dB) - equality is NOT gated. Local projected CRS EPSG:2154 (metres). See ../README.md.
